name: Wix
description: All-in-one website builder platform with visual editor, CMS collections, and headless API capabilities

description.value: All-in-one website builder platform with visual editor, CMS collections, and headless API capabilities

repository.comment: Wix is proprietary; SDK and templates are open source on GitHub

initial-release.comment: Founded 2006, public beta 2007, Flash editor launched 2008

github-stars.comment: Proprietary platform; SDK repos have modest star counts

cms-type.comment: Visual website builder with headless API support via Wix Headless

deployment-model.comment: Fully managed SaaS platform, no self-hosted option

primary-language.comment: Wix Velo (formerly Corvid) uses JavaScript; SDK is JavaScript/TypeScript

database-support.comment: Wix CMS Collections use proprietary database; external database connections available

api-type.comment: Both REST and GraphQL APIs available for headless usage

multi-tenancy.comment: Wix Studio supports managing multiple sites; enterprise features include shared content collections

static-site-generation.comment: Via headless integration with Next.js, Astro, and other SSG frameworks

edge-deployment.comment: 200+ CDN nodes globally with edge caching; AWS, GCP, and Fastly infrastructure

content-types.comment: CMS Collections allow defining custom content types with multiple or single item collections

custom-fields.comment: Multiple field types including text, rich text, media, reference, object, array, and more

field-types.comment: Supports Text, Rich Text, Rich Content, URL, Object, Array, Reference, Multi-Reference fields

content-relationships.comment: Reference and Multi-Reference field types for one-to-one and many-to-many relationships

nested-components.comment: Object field type allows complex nested data structures

localization.comment: Wix Multilingual supports 180+ languages with auto-translate via Google Translate; 3000 free word credits

content-validation.comment: Field type constraints and required field settings available

embedded-interactives.comment: Wix supports embedding apps, widgets, and interactive elements via drag-and-drop editor

content-versioning.comment: Site history allows viewing and restoring older versions

draft-publish.comment: Draft & Publish system for CMS content with Draft/Published status management

scheduled-publishing.comment: Scheduled publishing via automations and for blog posts; CMS content scheduling available

approval-workflows.comment: Role-based permissions available but no formal multi-step approval workflow

content-locking.comment: No explicit content locking feature documented; real-time collaboration instead

audit-logging.comment: Activity tracking available in dashboard; enterprise plans include enhanced logging

media-library.comment: Media Manager for images, videos, audio, documents, and vector art

image-transformations.comment: Built-in image editing, auto-conversion to AVIF, crop, flip, rotate, filters, and optimization

external-media-storage.comment: Media stored on Wix infrastructure; no native S3 or external storage integration

video-support.comment: Native video upload supported with storage limits based on plan (10GB free)

svg-support.comment: SVG upload supported up to 250KB; embedded images in SVGs not supported

folder-organization.comment: Media Manager supports folder organization for assets

role-based-access.comment: Predefined roles (Website Designer, Marketing Manager, etc.) and custom role creation

granular-permissions.comment: CMS permissions can be customized per collection; role permissions are granular

sso-saml.comment: SSO via OpenID Connect (not SAML) available for Wix Studio Enterprise only

team-collaboration.comment: Real-time collaboration, on-canvas commenting, concurrent editing in Wix Studio

audience-restrictions.comment: Member areas and gated content available for restricting access

typescript-sdk.comment: Official JavaScript SDK with TypeScript support (@wix/sdk, @wix/sdk-react)

content-type-sdk.comment: Collections defined via UI, not programmatically via SDK

cli-tools.comment: Wix CLI for Headless and Wix CLI for Apps available

local-development.comment: Local development supported via CLI and headless templates for Next.js, Astro

webhooks.comment: Webhook support for app and site events; SDK provides webhook handling methods

plugin-system.comment: Wix App Market with third-party apps; developers can build and sell custom apps

admin-ui-customization.comment: Dashboard extensions and custom app panels; Wix Blocks for visual app building

documentation-quality.comment: Comprehensive developer docs, help center, templates, and video tutorials

frontend-frameworks.comment: Official templates for Next.js and Astro; works with any framework via REST/GraphQL API

search-integration.comment: Built-in site search; no native Algolia integration but can integrate via apps

preview-mode.comment: Preview mode available in editor before publishing

ecommerce-integration.comment: Built-in Wix Stores with eCommerce, payments via Wix Payments and third-party processors

analytics-integration.comment: Built-in Wix Analytics plus Google Analytics integration; AI Visibility Overview for GEO

ai-features.comment: 20+ AI features including AI Site Generator, AI text creator, AI Visibility Overview for LLM search

cdn-included.comment: 200+ CDN nodes with AWS, GCP, and Fastly; automatic caching and optimization

response-caching.comment: Automatic page caching via CDN; cached versions stored up to a week

rate-limits.comment: API rate limits depend on plan tier and specific API endpoints

global-regions.comment: 3 data centers in NA/EU plus 200+ CDN nodes globally; multi-cloud with AWS and GCP

free-tier.comment: Free plan with Wix branding and ads; paid plans from $17/month

open-source.comment: Proprietary platform; SDK and templates are open source

pricing-model.comment: Free tier with paid plans: Light $17, Core $29, Business $36-39, Elite $159/month (annual billing)

commercial-support.comment: 24/7 support on all paid plans; dedicated success managers for enterprise

enterprise-features.comment: Enterprise solution includes SSO, SCIM, account-level analytics, custom development, SLAs
